title: Security Settings
description: Manage login protection for your current account.
invalidCode: The verification code is invalid or expired
disableConfirm: Disable two-factor authentication for this account?

totp.title: Two-factor authentication
totp.description: Require a 6-digit authenticator code after the API Key is validated.

setup.title: Bind authenticator
setup.description: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then enter the current 6-digit code.
setup.notice: The secret is saved only after the verification code passes.
